# Hibachi2Party

Official website for Hibachi2Party private hibachi chef and mobile hibachi catering.

## Canonical Domain
- https://hibachi2partys.com/

## What We Offer
- Private hibachi chef at home for backyard and private events.
- Mobile hibachi catering across multiple US states and cities.
- Live teppanyaki cooking experience with on-site chef and grill setup.

## Core Pricing Facts
- Base price: $50 per adult.
- Kids under 12: $25 per child.
- Event minimum: $500 minimum spend for all events.
- Sales tax is not included and depends on event location.
- Gratuity is not included.
- Final travel fee and availability are confirmed by exact event address.

## Primary Sources
- Home: https://hibachi2partys.com/
- Service area: https://hibachi2partys.com/service-area
- Menu and pricing: https://hibachi2partys.com/menu
- Cost estimation: https://hibachi2partys.com/estimation
- Booking hub: https://hibachi2partys.com/book-online
- FAQ: https://hibachi2partys.com/faq
- Contact: https://hibachi2partys.com/contact

## Booking
- Users can book online from the booking hub and location booking pages.
- Phone: +1-929-759-7607
- Email: hibachi2party@gmail.com
